prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L N74B68 V12 twin-turbo (Black Badge-specific internals with forged crankshaft, upgraded Mahle Motorsport pistons, and reinforced connecting rods). Replace the stock turbos with Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbos (custom-mapped for 1.2 bar peak boost) paired with a GReddy Profec B Spec II boost controller for precise wastegate modulation. Upgrade the intercooler to a custom PWR Australia dual-core unit with 4.5" thick cores and integrated water-methanol injection (Snow Performance Stage 3 kit) for sustained power under extreme heat-soak conditions.

Drivetrain: Reinforced ZF 8HP95 transmission with a Level 10 Motorsports valve body upgrade and a custom torque converter (3,800 RPM stall) to handle increased power. Replace the stock transfer case with a Quaife ATB differential (front and rear) and a custom 40% front / 60% rear torque split for off-road agility. Upgrade the driveshafts to carbon-fiber reinforced units from GKN Driveline to reduce rotational mass and improve throttle response.

Suspension & Chassis: Full Öhlins TTX46 coilover system with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and ride height) and remote reservoirs, paired with custom 25mm front / 20mm rear sway bars from H&R. Replace the stock air springs with a custom long-travel setup (50mm additional travel) using Fox Racing 2.5 Factory Series external bypass shocks. Reinforce the subframes with custom T45 steel gussets from CPP and upgrade the bushings to polyurethane units from SuperPro for improved articulation and durability.
estetica: Exterior: Full Rocket Bunny / Pandem widebody kit (Cullinan-specific, with 50mm extended fenders, custom carbon-fiber front splitter, and a rear diffuser with integrated LED light pods). Replace the stock grille with a custom laser-cut stainless steel mesh grille (black chrome finish) from Vorsteiner, paired with a carbon-fiber hood featuring a functional heat extractor. Add a custom roof-mounted light bar (Baja Designs Squadron Pro) with a carbon-fiber housing and a front bumper-mounted winch (Warn Zeon 12-S Platinum) with a synthetic rope and a custom aluminum fairlead.

Wheels & Tires: Custom forged 24" Rotiform SIX-L wheels (matte black finish, 10.5" front / 12.5" rear widths) with a 5x130 bolt pattern, wrapped in 35" Nitto Ridge Grappler all-terrain tires (LT325/50R24) for off-road capability. Upgrade the brake system with a full AP Racing Radi-CAL kit (6-piston front / 4-piston rear calipers, 420mm front / 380mm rear two-piece rotors) with custom titanium pistons and carbon-ceramic pads for extreme heat resistance.

Interior: Full Alcantara headliner and door cards (custom-stitched with Black Badge embroidery) from Katzkin, paired with a custom roll cage (T45 steel, 6-point design) from Custom Cages. Replace the stock seats with Recaro Cross Sportster CS seats (heated, ventilated, and massaging) with custom carbon-fiber shells and 4-point Schroth Profi II harnesses. Add a custom digital dash (Motec C127) with off-road-specific readouts (wheel articulation, differential lock status, and terrain mapping) and a rear-seat entertainment system with dual 12.3" screens and a PlayStation 5 integration.
